scripts.build: npm run build -w @prooflyt/contracts && npm run build -w @prooflyt/domain && npm run build -w @prooflyt/mapping && npm run build -w @prooflyt/agents && npm run build -w @prooflyt/api && npm run build -w @prooflyt/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @prooflyt/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @prooflyt/domain && npm run typecheck -w @prooflyt/mapping && npm run typecheck -w @prooflyt/api && npm run typecheck -w @prooflyt/web
